member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ConfigurationManager
member.summary: Base mode class to hold different modes.

member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration
member.summary: TimeUnderStressConfiguration.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique configuration name.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.CustomDffToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom DFF token to be used for storage of start time in DFF (for resume scenarios) as well as unique identifier of the configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.TemporaryTokensToPrint
member.summary: Gets or sets list of temporary tokens to print during loop status mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.DieName
member.summary: Gets or sets the die name to be used for storage of start time in DFF (for resume scenarios) as well as unique identifier of the configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.FlowItemName
member.summary: Gets or sets the flow item name.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.IsAutoDetectMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the configuration is auto detect.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.TargetStressTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the target loop time.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.MaxFlowLoopTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum flow loop time.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.NonStressTime
member.summary: Gets or sets nonStressTime (xTime).

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.SamplingInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets samplingInterval at which stress time will be calculated.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.StandardStartTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting stress time for standard mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.StartingStressTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the regular starting stress time.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.StressTime
member.summary: Gets or sets stressTime (sTime).

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.VoltageSetup
member.summary: Gets or sets the voltage setup.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.FlushSetup
member.summary: Gets or sets the Flush setup.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.Logger
member.summary: Gets or sets the ituff logger.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration.LoopTypeChecked
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the type of loop for the current configuration has already been checked.

member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.FlushSetup
member.summary: Setup variable in order to flush datalogs.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.FlushSetup.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Setup used to flush the datalogs.
member.param: Minimum time span of the flush API calls.
User specified bin to log at the temporary flush logs.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.FlushSetup.DatalogUserBin
member.summary: Gets or sets user bin to data log at flush command.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.FlushSetup.FlushTimeSpan
member.summary: Gets or sets flush time span.

member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.VoltageSetup
member.summary: Class to hold voltage setup.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.VoltageSetup.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String},System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Double})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Set up for all the voltage pins to read.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.VoltageSetup.SamplingInterval
member.summary: Gets sampling interval of the voltage pins to stream.

member.name: P:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.VoltageSetup.VoltageSuppliesThresholdMapping
member.summary: Gets threshold voltage of the pins to determine the stress condition met or not.

member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.EmptyLogger
member.summary: EmptyLogger.

member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ILogger
member.summary: ILogger.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ILogger.LogInstanceData(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: LogInstanceData.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ILogger.WriteStrgvalToDatalog(System.Int32,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes a value to datalog using the strgval format with the given postfix.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ILogger.WriteStrgvalToDatalog(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes a value to datalog using the strgval format with the given postfix.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ILogger.WriteStrgvalToDatalog(System.Double,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes a value to datalog using the strgval format with the given postfix.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ILogger.WriteComntToDatalog(System.Int32,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes an int value to datalog using the comnt format with the given postfix.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ILogger.WriteComntToDatalog(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes a value to datalog using the comnt format with the given postfix.

member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService
member.summary: This service is for logging time under stress data to shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.Start(System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Starts data collection on given dps resource list. If per-instance datalog is enabled then datalog prints will be in the format: 0_tname_{InstanceName}_TUSLog 0_strgval{Total Non Stress Time in ms}|{Total Stress Time in ms} Datalogging will occur on Stop() calls and during post execute.
member.param: If the per-instance datalog is enabled or not.
The session context of this operation.
member.example:
Example code to Start Time Under Stress monitoring from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.Start(<configurationName>,<voltageSuppliesThresholdMapping>,<samplingInterval>,<datalogEnabled>,<sessionContext>)
member.exception: Thrown when there is an active Time Under Stress configuration.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.Stop(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stops data collection on previously defined dps resource list. Writes stress/non-stress time to shared storage and datalog.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.example:
Example code to Stop Time Under Stress monitoring from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.Stop(<sessionContext>)
member.exception: Thrown when there is no active Time Under Stress configuration.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.StopAll(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stops data collection on any active configuration. Writes stress/non-stress time to shared storage and datalog. Will not error out in case there are no active configurations.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.example:
Example code to Stop All Time Under Stress monitoring from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.StopAll(<sessionContext>)

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.GetStressTime(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets currently stored stress time and writes to datalog if enabled. Stress time is updated using the Stop() function and during post execute.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.example:
Example code to Get Stress Time from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.GetStressTime(<sessionContext>)

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.GetNonStressTime(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets currently stored non-stress time. Non-stress time is updated using the Stop() function and during post execute.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.example:
Example code to Get Stress Time from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.GetNonStressTime(<sessionContext>)

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.IsTimeUnderStressActive(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Checks whether there is an active Time Under Stress Profile.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Whether or not there is a TUS profile active.
member.example:
Example code to check Is Time Under Stress Active from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.IsTimeUnderStressActive(<sessionContext>)

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.SaveStressTimes(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Inserts stress time and non-stress time into Shared Storage.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.example:
Example code to Save Stress Times from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.SaveStressTimes(<sessionContext>)

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.LoopStatus(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Executes the LoopStatus validation over a TUS configuration.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: LoopStatus result: Continue -> Continue port. Exit -> Exit port. Exceeded -> Flow loop above the given limit.
member.example:
Example code to run LoopStatus from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.LoopStatus(<sessionContext>)

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.GetConfiguration(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Retrieves the current TUS configuration from Storage.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The TUS configuration retrieved from Storage. If existing.
member.exception: In case no configuration is found.
member.example:
Example code to GetConfiguration from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.GetConfiguration(<sessionContext>)

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.SetConfiguration(Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Saves the current TUS configuration in Storage.
member.param: The TUS configuration to be stored.
The session context of this operation.
member.example:
Example code to SetConfiguration from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.SetConfiguration(<configuration>, <sessionContext>)

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.ITimeUnderStressService.DeleteConfiguration(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Deletes the current TUS configuration from Storage.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.example:
Example code to DeleteConfiguration from service.
Base.ServiceStore<ITimeUnderStressService>.Service.DeleteConfiguration(<sessionContext>)

member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.Logger
member.summary: Logger.

member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.LoopStatus
member.summary: LoopStatus mode for Time Under Stress logger.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.LoopStatus.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.LoopStatus.Execute
member.summary: Executes the LoopStatus check for a specific TUS configuration.
member.returns: Port number based on the LoopStatus verifications: 1 -> Continue port. 2 -> Exit port. -1 -> Flow loop above the given limit.

member.name: T:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants
member.summary: Constants to be used in the entire TimeUnderStress logger project.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.StressTimeTag
member.summary: Standard tag for stress time.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.NonStressTimeTag
member.summary: Standard tag for non stress time.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.DoRemoveOnHoldDutStreamingSamples
member.summary: Flag to determine whether or not to remove on hold streaming samples.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.CollectionDataType
member.summary: Collection data type to be considered.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.TusConfigurationKey
member.summary: Prefix for the TUS configuration object in shared storage.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.MaxAllowedTimeDiff
member.summary: Maximum allowed time difference between sum of sTime and xTime compared to CompletedLoopTime.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.ExecuteFailPort
member.summary: Port for Execution failure.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.MilliSecondsDenoter
member.summary: Number to convert milliseconds to seconds.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.StressTimePerDieSavedForLoopStatus
member.summary: Shared Storage token name to store Stress time per die.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.TimeDiffStartAndLastSnapshot
member.summary: Key name to hold Time Difference from start to last snapshot.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.TimeOfLastFlush
member.summary: Gets or sets the last time when ituff flush was called.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.LoopStatusAutoStimeItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusAutoStimeItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.LoopStatusAutoXtimeItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusAutoXtimeItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.LoopStatusAutoSummaryItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusAutoSummaryItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.LoopStatusStandardSummaryItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusStandardSummaryItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressConstants.LoopStatusStandardStimeItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusStandardStimeItuffTag.

member.name: M:Prime.TimeUnderStressService.TimeUnderStressService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.LoopStatusResult
member.summary: LoopStatus results.

member.name: F:TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.LoopStatusResult.Exit
member.summary: Target stress time has been reached.

member.name: F:TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.LoopStatusResult.Continue
member.summary: Target stress time is not reached yet.

member.name: F:TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.LoopStatusResult.Exceeded
member.summary: Flow loop above the given limit.
